overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic urban plaza. The player moves through neon-lit covered walkways, ascends and descends multi-level concrete stairs, crosses a yellow-striped intersection, and walks along sidewalks surrounded by holographic advertisements, futuristic architecture, and pedestrians carrying umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with neon food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza, passing neon-lit food stalls on the right

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a purple-lit food counter

entered.detail: large curved concrete and metal roof structure covering the walkway
food vendor stall illuminated with bright purple and pink neon lighting
rain-soaked ground reflecting neon lights and overhead illumination
tall vertical digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban plaza at night during light rain. The player walks forward on wet reflective pavement past a purple neon-lit food stall on the right. Overhead, a large curved roof structure provides shelter while digital billboards glow on the left building facade. Pedestrians move through the space, and the atmosphere is dense with cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stairway ascending between plaza levels

events.description: exits covered plaza area into open space approaching wide concrete stairs
begins ascending wide concrete staircase to upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs toward the upper plaza level, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending the stairs while holding a glowing umbrella

entered.detail: broad concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward between levels
group of palm trees with uplighting at the top of the stairs
elevated open plaza area visible at the top of the staircase

segments.scene_description: Leaving the covered walkway, the player approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase to an upper plaza level. The environment opens up to the night sky with light rain falling. Palm trees line the ascent, and the lighting shifts from enclosed artificial to open atmospheric. Other pedestrians move up and down the stairs, some carrying illuminated umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper plaza level with digital advertisements and neon accents

events.description: reaches top of stairs entering the open upper plaza area
turns right while walking to navigate around plaza structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza, turning right to navigate the open space while observing the surroundings

entered.detail: building facade accented with bright cyan neon lighting along edges
tall structure displaying rotating holographic advertisements
concrete seating structures with pedestrians resting

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper plaza level, the player moves through an open area surrounded by futuristic architecture. A cyan neon-trimmed building dominates the right side while holographic advertisements glow in the distance. The player turns right to navigate the space, passing concrete benches and sparse pedestrian traffic. The rain continues to fall, creating reflective surfaces on the paved ground.

events.description: begins descending stairs to return to street level

agents.ego_description: walking down the concrete stairs toward the street level, following a pedestrian with an umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing blue umbrella descending ahead of the player

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading downward with metal handrails on sides
opening at bottom of stairs revealing street level with vehicle lights

segments.scene_description: The player descends a wide concrete staircase back toward street level. The environment becomes more enclosed and darker, with artificial lighting illuminating the steps. Ahead, a pedestrian with a glowing blue umbrella leads the way down. At the bottom, street lights and the glow of vehicle headlights become visible, indicating the transition back to the busy street level.

events.description: exits staircase onto sidewalk at street level
crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection on yellow crosswalk stripes, moving with the flow of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with illuminated orange umbrella crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing marked with bold yellow stripes and green walk symbols
large horizontal billboard displaying 'CYBERPUNK' in bright neon letters
tall pole with traffic signals showing red light for vehicles

segments.scene_description: Reaching street level, the player steps onto a wide urban intersection marked with bold yellow crosswalk stripes. The player crosses the street alongside other pedestrians, some carrying illuminated umbrellas. A prominent 'CYBERPUNK' billboard glows on the right building facade, while traffic lights and sparse vehicle traffic occupy the road. The atmosphere remains rainy and neon-lit.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along commercial street with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past storefronts with neon signage, moving away from the intersection

entered.detail: shop fronts with glowing purple and cyan neon signs at street level
metal railing separating sidewalk from street level drop

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the player walks along a concrete sidewalk lined with neon-lit storefronts on the left. A metal railing runs along the right edge, separating the walkway from the street below. The environment continues the cyberpunk aesthetic with glowing signage and wet surfaces reflecting the artificial lights. Fewer pedestrians are present on this section of the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered, neon-lit urban corridor into an expansive, rain-soaked upper plaza. It begins under a large curved roof, gliding across wet reflective pavement past a purple neon food stall and glowing digital billboards. As the camera leaves the covered walkway, the environment opens up to the night sky while ascending a wide concrete staircase lined with palm trees and pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas. The scene then shifts to an open upper level dominated by futuristic architecture and a cyan neon-trimmed building, where the camera turns right to navigate past concrete benches. Finally, the movement continues through the open plaza, passing holographic advertisements that glow against the dark, rainy atmosphere.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an enclosed concrete descent into the expansive, neon-lit bustle of a rainy urban intersection and along a glowing city sidewalk. It begins by descending a wide staircase into a darker, more confined space, following a pedestrian with a glowing blue umbrella toward the distant glimmer of street lights and headlights. As the camera reaches the bottom, the scene opens up onto a wide intersection where the player crosses bold yellow stripes alongside other pedestrians under the glow of a prominent Cyberpunk billboard. The movement then shifts from the open road to a concrete sidewalk, passing by neon-lit storefronts and a metal railing that separates the walkway from the street. Finally, the environment settles into a steady pace along the wet pavement, where the artificial lights of the city reflect off the rain-soaked surfaces.
